mapper.select: select customer_id, menu_id, create_by, create_time, delete_by, delete_time from sb_customer_menu where customer_id = #{customerId} and delete_time is null
select menu_id from sb_customer_menu where customer_id = #{customerId} and delete_time is null
mapper.insert:
insert into sb_customer_menu (customer_id, menu_id, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.customerId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select count(1) from sb_customer_menu where customer_id = #{customerId} and menu_id = #{menuId} and delete_time is null
